item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 13,952 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Recently_Updated Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Double under Toreando Leg drag S grip Lapel choke defence Sid...

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes Gameplan README Empty_Pages Formatting index Banana split Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke Bow and arrow .

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Empty_Pages Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Hook Drills Double leg Rubber guard .

item.title: Z guard
item.description: General Variant of Half guard, which should prevent Stacking and therefore allow you to prevent opponent from passing as easily.

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Author I am a 34 year old white belt, who started 08/2023.

item.title: Canto choke
item.description: General Arm and leg choke where you typically have Cross collar -grip and have a shin pressed on the neck.

item.title: Gameplan
item.description: General Goal of this page is to outline a plan of what to do in different scenarios.

item.title: Berimbolo
item.description: General Berimbolo is essentially an attack system to take the back.

item.title: Shoulder Drop
item.description: General Move from Standing where you control the opponents arm with two of yours, or alternatively have Sleeve and collar grip.
